text: In the first space, I feel a sense of openness and possibility—its minimalism is almost meditative, inviting introspection and calm. The bean bags suggest comfort, perhaps even a place for thoughtful exchange. The second space, vibrant and full of information, stimulates my curiosity. Surrounded by screens and words, I am drawn to reflect on the relationship between humans and technology, progress and contemplation. Together, these rooms evoke a subtle excitement about learning, tempered by a gentle reassurance in the quiet corners where I can pause and think.
